description_long: This is a tall, elegant vase with a warm, wood-like texture and a faceted, polygonal surface that gives it a handcrafted appearance. The body is gently curved, tapering at the neck and base, and flaring outward at the rim and foot. Two rounded handles are attached symmetrically on opposite sides, blending smoothly into the vessel's form. The surface is composed of interlocking geometric panels, creating a subtle mosaic effect. The coloration is a rich, reddish-brown, reminiscent of polished mahogany or cherry wood. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding flowers or decorative items.
description: A tall, faceted wooden vase with two rounded handles and a warm reddish-brown finish, featuring a geometric mosaic surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vase's curved body and a single handle visible on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both rounded handles and the full width of the vase's body.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite handle visible on the left side.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, showing both handles and the vase's symmetrical shape.
